title: NQBlade Backtest (2021-2026)
author: Some_Fly_4552
selftext: This backtest covers NQBlade on NAS100 from 2021 to 2026, giving a much broader view of how the bot performs across very different market conditions. Instead of showing only a few good trades, this test includes multiple years of trending, volatile, and more difficult phases. The strategy is based on trend-following, higher-timeframe confirmation, volatility filters, and structured risk management, making the results more meaningful than a short isolated test window.
